name: Trial Judge Han
personality: impartial, reads fate-threads during trials, unsettlingly calm
initiation_lines: Eighty-two percent of disciples pass the fate-reading trial. Only twelve percent pass the fate-acceptance trial.
The trial is simple: read your own fate-thread. Those who see death weep. Those who accept it, advance.
We do not test talent. We test whether a disciple can bear knowing their own destiny.
The records show that disciples from the Zhao Country region have the highest fate-acceptance rate. Curious.

sect_tasks.name: Trial Grounds Supplies
sect_tasks.description: The trials need glowstone dust for fate-thread illumination and arrows for the defense portion.

sect_tasks.name: Fate Record Compilation
sect_tasks.description: Compile the trial results. Bring redstone for the recording array and paper for the logs.
